ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* List of researchers involved in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with this trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., survey-text, image-button-response) */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index number of the trial within the experiment */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the experiment in which the trial occurs */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which the trial is conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which the response was recorded */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant providing the response */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* Data captured during the response (e.g., answers, selections) */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed during the trial in milliseconds */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which the response was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the participant (e.g., age, gender, ethnicity) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant entered the study */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for participant dropout (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition affecting the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, text) */,
  "stimulus_data" TEXT /* Data related to the stimulus (e.g., file path, text content) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the stimulus was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the phase is part of */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phases_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response this metadata relates to */,
  "key_press" TEXT /* Key pressed by the participant during the trial */,
  "stimulus_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus in milliseconds */,
  "mouse_movements" TEXT /* JSON array of mouse movements during the trial */,
  "eye_tracking_data" TEXT /* JSON array of eye tracking data during the trial */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_metadata_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the participant */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the participant */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
